CustomField.description:
The Total Assessed Value from the most recent Assessed Value - Property Taxes record. Value copies automatically.
Tip: For past assessment values for this Property, see Field History list. You made need to turn on Field History Tracking for this field.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
The Total Assessed Value from the most recent Assessed Value - Property Taxes record. Value copies automatically.
Tip: For past assessment values for this Property, see Field History list. You made need to turn on Field History Tracking for this field.
CustomField.label: Assessed Value
